item.description:
What's new in 0.1.30

  • Share polish: the Share control on Stats is now a compact icon, and the style picker shows a little preview of each look instead of just its name.
  • Every shared card now carries the AwakeMate mark and awakemate.app along the bottom, so a card stays recognisable wherever it ends up.
  • Buttons across the app now light up as you hover them, so it is clearer what you are about to click.
